name: circuit-next
description: Claude Code plugin that automates common developer flows with per-step configurability (model, effort, skills), grounded in evidence-based prompting research and contract-first + architecture-first + tiny-step-ratcheting methodology.

scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && node scripts/emit-flows.mjs --check
scripts.verify:fast: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:fast && node scripts/emit-flows.mjs --check
